name: Anchor Browser
description: Anchor Browser cloud automation API for AI agents. Spin up browser sessions and persist authenticated state via reusable Profiles (cookies, localStorage, auth tokens) so agents stay logged in across runs.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Anchor API key from https://app.anchorbrowser.io (Settings > API Keys).

tools.name: create_session
tools.description: Create a new browser session. Returns a session ID, websocket connection URL for Playwright/Puppeteer, and a live-view URL. Optionally attach a saved Profile to start the session already logged in.

profile.description: Name of a saved profile to load. The session inherits that profile's cookies, localStorage, and auth tokens.

proxy.description: Proxy config: { active: boolean, type: 'anchor_residential' | 'custom', url, username, password }.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List browser sessions for the account.

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Get details for a specific session: status, ws URL, live-view URL, recording URL when available.

tools.name: end_session
tools.description: End a live browser session and release its resources.

tools.name: create_profile
tools.description: Save the current state of a browser session as a reusable Profile. Profiles capture cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB — i.e. everything that defines an authenticated identity. Future sessions can load this profile to skip login.

name.description: Profile name (used to reference it in create_session.profile).

session_id.description: Session to capture state from. The session must still be live.

tools.name: list_profiles
tools.description: List saved profiles for the account.

tools.name: delete_profile
tools.description: Delete a saved profile. Sessions that referenced it will no longer be able to load it but already-live sessions are unaffected.
